title: cyperus acuminatus var. cyrtolepis
intro: Cyperus acuminatus var. cyrtolepis, also known as the Spike-grass or Umbrella-sedge, is a plant species that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Cyperus acuminatus var. cyrtolepis include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help reduce swelling and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and poultices, and is also used in traditional remedies such as salves and ointments.
